description: RBlock object representing a single rigid block in PFC discrete element simulation. RBlocks are polyhedral rigid bodies defined by a template geometry. Obtained via itasca.rblock.find(), itasca.rblock.list(), or itasca.rblock.near().
note: Objects of this type should not be created (instantiated) directly in Python. Use 'rblock generate' or 'rblock create' commands (via itasca.command()) to create rblocks, then retrieve them with module functions.

methods.name: aspect_ratio
methods.description: Get the rblock aspect ratio..

methods.name: ball_pos
methods.description: Get the rblock internal ball position (vector).

methods.name: ball_pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock internal ball position.

methods.name: ball_pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock internal ball position.

methods.name: ball_pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock internal ball position.

methods.name: ball_radius
methods.description: Get the rblock ball radius..

methods.name: collide
methods.description: Get the intersection status of two rigid blocks.

methods.name: contact_count
methods.description: Get the number of contacts associated with this rblock. If the optional keyword argument type is given, the count is limited to the contact types specified. The type keyword argument should be a Python type object (one of: itasca.BallBallContact, itasca.BallPebbleContact, itasca.PebblePebbleContact, itasca.BallFacetContact or itasca.PebbleFacetContact). If the (optional) keyword argument all is True the count includes virtual contacts.

methods.name: contacts
methods.signature: rblock.contacts([piece: object, ]all=False, type=None) -> Tuple of Contact objects
methods.description: Get a tuple of contacts associated with this rblock. An optional argument can be included which is a piece object (a Ball, a Pebble, an RBlock or a Facet). If the optional keyword argument type is given, the returned list is limited to the contact types specified. The type keyword argument should be a Python type object (one of: itasca.BallBallContact, itasca.BallPebbleContact, itasca.PebblePebbleContact, itasca.BallFacetContact or itasca.PebbleFacetContact). If the (optional) keyword argument all is True the returned list includes virtual contacts.

methods.name: damp
methods.description: Get the rblock local damping.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Delete this rblock.

methods.name: density
methods.description: Get the rblock density.

methods.name: disp
methods.description: Get the rblock displacement (vector).

methods.name: disp_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock displacement.

methods.name: disp_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock displacement.

methods.name: disp_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock displacement.

methods.name: euler
methods.description: Get the rblock orientation (vector).

methods.name: euler_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock orientation.

methods.name: euler_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock orientation.

methods.name: euler_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock orientation.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the rblock extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: fix
methods.description: Get the rblock fixity condition. The integer degree-of-freedom cooresponds to the following order: in 3D: 0) x-velocity, 1) y-velocity, 2) z-velocity, 3) x-angular velocity, 4) y-angular velocity, 5) z-angular velocity. in 2D: 0) x-velocity, 1) y-velocity, 2) angular velocity. The return value is false for free and true for fixed conditions.

methods.name: force_app
methods.description: Get the rblock applied force (vector).

methods.name: force_app_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock applied force.

methods.name: force_app_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock applied force.

methods.name: force_app_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock applied force.

methods.name: force_contact
methods.description: Get the rblock contact force (vector).

methods.name: force_contact_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock contact force.

methods.name: force_contact_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock contact force.

methods.name: force_contact_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock contact force.

methods.name: force_unbal
methods.description: Get the rblock unbalanced force (vector).

methods.name: force_unbal_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock unbalanced force.

methods.name: force_unbal_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock unbalanced force.

methods.name: force_unbal_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock unbalanced force.

methods.name: fragment
methods.description: Get the rblock fragment ID.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the rblock group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: rblock.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the rblock. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this rblock is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: has_prop
methods.description: Returns True if the rblock has the given surface property.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the rblock id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: rblock.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the rblock is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: inside
methods.description: Test whether a point is inside a rblock.

methods.name: mass
methods.description: Get the rblock inertial mass.

methods.name: mass_real
methods.description: Get the rblock real (gravitational) mass.

methods.name: moi
methods.description: Get the rblock moment of intertia. In 2D the polar moment of intertial is used so the return value is a float.

methods.name: moi_fix
methods.description: Get the moment of intertia fixity state. When activated, the rblock moment of inertia will not be automatically updated when a rblock is scaled, the volume is changed, or when the density is changed. This is activated automatically when either the volume or moment of inertia is set manually via the rblock attribute command or via the RBlock object methods vol(), moi_real() or moi_prinreal().

methods.name: moi_prin
methods.description: Get the rblock principal moment of inertia (vector).

methods.name: moi_prin_real
methods.description: Get the rblock real principal moment of inertia. When modified no other rblock attributes are changed. The specification of the moment of inertia in this way results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rblock unless the user changes the fix state (see the RBlock moi_fix() method) (vector).

methods.name: moi_prin_real_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock real principal moment of inertia. When modified no other rblock attributes are changed. The specification of the moment of inertia in this way results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rblock unless the user changes the fix state (see the RBlock moi_fix() method).

methods.name: moi_prin_real_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock real principal moment of inertia. When modified no other rblock attributes are changed. The specification of the moment of inertia in this way results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rblock unless the user changes the fix state (see the RBlock moi_fix() method).

methods.name: moi_prin_real_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock real principal moment of inertia. When modified no other rblock attributes are changed. The specification of the moment of inertia in this way results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rblock unless the user changes the fix state (see the RBlock moi_fix() method).

methods.name: moi_prin_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock principal moment of inertia.

methods.name: moi_prin_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock principal moment of inertia.

methods.name: moi_prin_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock principal moment of inertia.

methods.name: moi_real
methods.description: Get the rblock real moment of intertia. In 2D the polar moment of intertial is used so the return value is a float.

methods.name: moment_app
methods.description: Get the rblock applied moment (vector).

methods.name: moment_app_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock applied moment.

methods.name: moment_app_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock applied moment.

methods.name: moment_app_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock applied moment.

methods.name: moment_contact
methods.description: Get the rblock contact moment (vector).

methods.name: moment_contact_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock contact moment.

methods.name: moment_contact_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock contact moment.

methods.name: moment_contact_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock contact moment.

methods.name: moment_unbal
methods.description: Get the rblock unbalanced moment (vector).

methods.name: moment_unbal_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock unbalanced moment.

methods.name: moment_unbal_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock unbalanced moment.

methods.name: moment_unbal_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock unbalanced moment.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the rblock centroid location (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock centroid location.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock centroid location.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock centroid location.

methods.name: prop
methods.description: Get a surface property value of this rblock.

methods.name: props
methods.description: Get a dictionary of all the surface properties of this rblock.

methods.name: rotate
methods.description: Rotate a rblock. The rotation point is the rblock position and it is rotated in a right handed sense about the given axis by rotation_angle degrees.

methods.name: rounding
methods.description: Get the rblock rounding..

methods.name: scale_sphere
methods.description: Scale the rblock to an equivalent sphere. The rblock is scaled so that its {area in 2D; volume in 3D} is the same as a {circle in 2D; sphere in 3D} of the given diameter. If the volume or moment of inertia has been previously specified by the user either via rblock attribute or via the RBlock object methods (vol(), moi_prin_real() or moi_real()), the principal moment of inertial is in a fixed state and will not be scaled. See the Cump object moi_fix() method for further details.

methods.name: scale_vol
methods.description: Scale the rblock. The rblock is scaled so that its {volume per unit thickness in 2D; volume in 3D} is as specified. If the volume or moment of inertia has been previously specified by the user either via rblock attribute or via the RBlock object methods (vol(), moi_prin_real() or moi_real()), the principal moment of inertial is in a fixed state and will not be scaled. See the Cump object moi_fix() method for further details.

methods.name: set_damp
methods.description: Set the rblock local damping.

methods.name: set_density
methods.description: Set the rblock density.

methods.name: set_disp
methods.description: Set the rblock displacement (vector).

methods.name: set_disp_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the rblock displacement.

methods.name: set_disp_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the rblock displacement.

methods.name: set_disp_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the rblock displacement.

methods.name: set_euler
methods.description: Set the rblock orientation (vector).

methods.name: set_euler_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the rblock orientation.

methods.name: set_euler_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the rblock orientation.

methods.name: set_euler_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the rblock orientation.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the rblock extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_fix
methods.description: Get the rblock fixity condition. The integer degree-of-freedom cooresponds to the following order: in 3D: 1) x-velocity, 2) y-velocity, 3) z-velocity, 4) x-angular velocity, 5) y-angular velocity, 6) z-angular velocity. in 2D: 1) x-velocity, 2) y-velocity, 3) angular velocity. The fixity value is false for free and true for fixed conditions.

methods.name: set_force_app
methods.description: Set the rblock applied force (vector).

methods.name: set_force_app_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the rblock applied force.

methods.name: set_force_app_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the rblock applied force.

methods.name: set_force_app_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the rblock applied force.

methods.name: set_force_contact
methods.description: Set the rblock contact force (vector).

methods.name: set_force_contact_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the rblock contact force.

methods.name: set_force_contact_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the rblock contact force.

methods.name: set_force_contact_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the rblock contact force.

methods.name: set_fragment
methods.description: Set rblock fragment ID.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: rblock.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the rblock group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_moi_fix
methods.description: Set the moment of intertia fixity state. When activated, the rblock moment of inertia will not be automatically updated when a rblock is scaled, the volume is changed, or when the density is changed. This is activated automatically when either the volume or moment of inertia is set manually via the rblock attribute command or via the RBlock object methods vol(), moi_real() or moi_prinreal().

methods.name: set_moi_prin_real
methods.description: Set the rblock real principal moment of inertia. When modified no other rblock attributes are changed. The specification of the moment of inertia in this way results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rblock unless the user changes the fix state (see the RBlock moi_fix() method) (vector).

methods.name: set_moi_prin_real_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the rblock real principal moment of inertia. When modified no other rblock attributes are changed. The specification of the moment of inertia in this way results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rblock unless the user changes the fix state (see the RBlock moi_fix() method).

methods.name: set_moi_prin_real_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the rblock real principal moment of inertia. When modified no other rblock attributes are changed. The specification of the moment of inertia in this way results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rblock unless the user changes the fix state (see the RBlock moi_fix() method).

methods.name: set_moi_prin_real_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the rblock real principal moment of inertia. When modified no other rblock attributes are changed. The specification of the moment of inertia in this way results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rblock unless the user changes the fix state (see the RBlock moi_fix() method).

methods.name: set_moi_real
methods.description: Get the rblock real moment of intertia. In 2D the polar moment of intertial is used so the return value is a float. When modified no other rblock attributes are changed. The specification of the moment of inertia in this way results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rblock unless the user changes the fix state (see the RBlock moi_fix() method).

methods.name: set_moment_app
methods.description: Set the rblock applied moment (vector).

methods.name: set_moment_app_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the rblock applied moment.

methods.name: set_moment_app_y

methods.description: Set the rblock contact moment (vector).

methods.name: set_moment_contact_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the rblock contact moment.

methods.name: set_moment_contact_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the rblock contact moment.

methods.description: Set the rblock centroid location (vector).

methods.name: set_pos_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the rblock centroid location.

methods.name: set_pos_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the rblock centroid location.

methods.name: set_prop
methods.description: Set a surface property of this rblock.

methods.name: set_spin
methods.description: Set the rblock angular velocity (vector).

methods.name: set_spin_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the rblock angular velocity.

methods.name: set_spin_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the rblock angular velocity.

methods.name: set_spin_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the rblock angular velocity.

methods.name: set_vel
methods.description: Set the rblock velocity (vector).

methods.name: set_vel_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the rblock velocity.

methods.name: set_vel_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the rblock velocity.

methods.name: set_vel_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the rblock velocity.

methods.name: set_vol
methods.description: Set the rblock volume. In 2D this is the volume per unit thickness.

methods.name: spin
methods.description: Get the rblock angular velocity (vector).

methods.name: spin_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock angular velocity.

methods.name: spin_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock angular velocity.

methods.name: spin_z

methods.name: stress
methods.description: Get the stress tensor arising from all contacts acting on the rblock.

methods.name: to_global
methods.description: Rotate a vector from principal system. The returned vector is in the global axis system.

methods.name: to_prin
methods.description: Rotate a vector to principal system.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this rblock is live.

methods.name: vel
methods.description: Get the rblock velocity (vector).

methods.name: vel_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock velocity.

methods.name: vel_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock velocity.

methods.name: vel_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock velocity.

methods.name: vol
methods.description: Get the rblock volume. In 2D this is the volume per unit thickness.
